warnings: Calculation not run: required inputs (molecular charge and spin multiplicity) were not provided by the user.

prose:
Unable to run the requested frontier‐orbital DFT (B3LYP/def2‐TZVP) calculation for furan because two mandatory inputs remain unspecified:

• Total charge of the molecule
• Spin multiplicity (2S + 1)

The calculation cannot be launched without explicit values for both fields, and the reporting standards prohibit assuming them without user confirmation. Typical furan is neutral (charge 0) and closed‐shell (multiplicity 1), but I need you to confirm or correct these numbers before proceeding.

No computation has been performed, so no orbital energies or files exist to report. Please provide the charge and multiplicity if you’d like me to rerun the calculation.
